bugs_fixed.title: Python blocks execute twice
bugs_fixed.root_cause: executePython() broadcasts output real-time AND callers re-broadcast pyResult.output
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed 3 duplicate broadcastStatus python-output calls from callers in server/player.js

bugs_fixed.title: Debug mode crashes on second restart
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Old child process close event deletes new process from runningDebugProcesses and broadcasts 'finished'
bugs_fixed.fix: Guard close/error handlers with process identity check; delete old entry before spawning new one

bugs_fixed.title: UnicodeDecodeError with Chinese text
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Python wrapper open() without encoding='utf-8' defaults to system locale on Windows
bugs_fixed.fix: Added encoding='utf-8' to open() calls and ensure_ascii=False to json.dump() in both wrappers

bugs_fixed.title: Drag-and-drop broken for composite blocks
bugs_fixed.root_cause: dragstart e.target is the draggable block-container, not the clicked element; header.contains(e.target) always false
bugs_fixed.fix: Track mousedown target via capture-phase listener; use real click target for header containment check in dragstart

regression_risk: minimal — all changes are additive guards or removal of duplicate calls
